text: Forkhead box J1 (FOXJ1) is a master regulator of motile ciliogenesis which is necessary and also sufficient to program cells to grow functional motile cilia (Vij et al., 2012; Zhou and Roy, 2015). Studies in different model organisms have shown that the loss of FOXJ1 results in a loss of motile cilia (Brody et al., 2000; Chenet al., 1998; Stubbs et al., 2008; Vij et al., 2012).
